ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the theater */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the theater */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the theater */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the theater's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screens" (
  "screen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screen */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theater where the screen is located */,
  "screen_number" INTEGER /* Number of the screen */,
  "screen_type" TEXT /* Type of screen (e.g., 2D, 3D, IMAX) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the screen */,
  "audio_system" TEXT /* Type of audio system (e.g., Dolby Atmos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screens_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenings" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being screened */,
  "screen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the screen where the movie is shown */,
  "show_time" TEXT /* Time at which the movie is screened */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the screening */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket for the screening */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats still available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenings_screen_id FOREIGN KEY ("screen_id") REFERENCES screens ("screen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the screening for which the ticket was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the ticket */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_screening_id FOREIGN KEY ("screening_id") REFERENCES screenings ("screening_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "membership_id" TEXT /* Membership ID for loyalty program members */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theater where the employee works */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the ticket */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Completed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
